summary: Sari Wibowo is a full-stack engineer and independent product consultant who helps small teams turn messy manual operations into reliable internal software. Ten years across web platforms, workflow automation, and data-visibility tooling.

experience.title: Founder & Principal Engineer — Lumina Studio
experience.content: Founded Lumina Studio, a two-person product engineering practice building internal tools and workflow automation for logistics and retail SMEs. Led delivery of process-automation systems replacing spreadsheet and chat-based approval flows.

experience.title: Engineering Lead — PayGrid
experience.content: Led a cross-functional team of eight building payment reconciliation and reporting tooling. Owned architecture for a Go microservices backend and a React operations dashboard. Grew the team from three to eight engineers.
